quality.description_clarity: High. Clearly explains the mechanical effect (at-will casting of Animal Friendship) and duration.
quality.flavor_text_relevance: Good. The ingredients listed relate thematically to animals.
quality.completeness: Complete for a standard D&D item description.

mechanics.primary_effect: Grants at-will casting of Animal Friendship spell for 1 hour.
mechanics.power_level_justification: Uncommon rarity is appropriate for an item granting a 1st-level spell at-will for a limited duration.
